sources.title: NICE guideline NG158: Venous thromboembolic diseases: diagnosis, management and thrombophilia testing (covers Wells score, D-dimer, ultrasound for suspected DVT/PE)
NICE NG158 Context (summary of diagnostic approach incl. Wells score, D-dimer, imaging for suspected DVT/PE)
AAFP: Diagnosis of Deep Venous Thrombosis and Pulmonary Embolism (clinical review; use of clinical prediction + D-dimer + ultrasound)
